title: Hamar, Innlandet — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Hamar, Innlandet: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Hamar is a city in Innlandet with a population of 31,000. A lakeside city on Lake Mjøsa, known for its Viking ship museum, indoor speed skating arena, and outdoor life.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
